sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26738" key="diexh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεχ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n26738.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">discontinuous,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συνεχής,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.115f</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:3:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.10</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σπεῖρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg011:p.119" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Euc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.119</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> F.</sense> </entryFree>
